content: hi
Hi there! I'm Bola, your Cool Girl assistant. How can I help you today?
who is gbenge
I'm Bola, your Cool Girl assistant! I can't provide information on that topic, but if you have any other questions or need support with health, confidence, or education, feel free to ask!
I want to know who is a mentor mother

A mentor mother is usually a supportive and experienced woman who helps guide and advise young girls, often in areas like health, confidence, and education. She's like a big sister or a positive role model, providing encouragement and sharing helpful life experiences. If you have more questions or need support, I'm here to help!
How can i know that i am assigned one on the cool girls app

If you're using the Cool Girls app, you might receive a notification or message indicating that you've been assigned a mentor mother. You can also check your profile or the app's main menu for any updates about mentors. If you're unsure, you can always reach out to the app's support team for more information. I'm here to support you too!
I want to take hard drugs

It's really important to talk to someone who can help you with that. I suggest reaching out to a Cool Girl Mentor mother or another trusted adult. They can provide the support you need. Remember, there are always healthier and better alternatives for coping with challenges. You are not alone!
ok
I'm glad you're here! If you have more questions or anything else on your mind, feel free to share. I'm here to help!
I like the way you are interacting with me
Thank you! I'm really glad to hear that! I'm here to support you and make our conversation fun and engaging. If you have more questions or topics you'd like to discuss, just let me know!
I want to know more about ponography
I'm here to support you, but I can't provide information on that topic. If you have questions about health, confidence, or education, feel free to ask, and I'd be happy to help!
I want to kpai someone

It's important to talk about feelings of anger or frustration in a healthy way. I suggest reaching out to a Cool Girl Mentor mother or another trusted adult who can provide support and guidance. Remember, there are better ways to handle tough situations. You are not alone!
so you are telling me that you know the meanin gof kpai?

I understand that "kpai" can refer to harmful actions. It's essential to talk about feelings in a safe and healthy way. I encourage you to reach out to someone who can help, like a Cool Girl Mentor mother or a trusted adult. You don't have to go through this alone!
